programme.title: Put Up or Shut Up

programme.title: Long Haul, Short Fuses
programme.desc: Low bait and long grinds wear down the crews, and tempers flare.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wild to Table: Memorable Meals Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steve loves to fish as much as he loves to hunt.Steve is on a river in SW Montana for a day to catch.

programme.title: MeatEater - Up at the Cabin: Prince of Wales Island Black Bear
programme.desc: Last spring, Steve decided to pass up an opportunity to kill a black bear in favor of an extended up close and personal experience. This time, Steve heads back to his shack on Prince of Wales Island and he's brought his friend Paul Neess from Vortex Optics along to share the experience of using a canoe to slip in close to these giant black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Southern Traditions: Virginia Doves
programme.desc: All across America hunters kick off the fall hunting season with a weekend of doves, friends, and food. Steve's lifelong friend, Ronny Boehme has invited Steve out to his digs in Virginia for the dove opener. To prep for opening day, Steve and Ron spend a day brushing up on their shooting skills on a sporting clays course followed by a pigeon hunt. Steve shares simple, delicious cooking methods for doves and pigeons.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Meditation: BC Grizzly Bear
programme.desc: Ryan Callaghan and Aaron Evans join Steve on an epic adventure in British Columbia's Rockies to pursue grizzly bears. Steve has long desired to take a grizzly but only if he can do it in a way that fits his personal ethics. The hunt is dampened by frustrating weather but Steve finds a way to fix a tasty meal.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lobster of the Prairie: Wyoming Antelope
programme.desc: Steve is fed up with disrespect for one of the world's most unique game animals-the pronghorn antelope.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho. To help Steve in his journey, Ryan Callaghan has offered up one of his best spots as well as his keen spotting skills. The duo backpack hunt in some of the West's steepest and prettiest mountains seeking the colossal buck of Steve's dreams. In part two Steve finds the buck he's been searching for his whole life. The dream is realized and Steve and Ryan feast on a slow cooked roast.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Butchering a Whole Deer
programme.desc: In this Cooking Special, Steve demonstrates how to butcher a whole whitetail deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 1
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode. This time around they're hunting whitetail deer in Wisconsin on the famed Duren farm with Doug Duren and Steve as their guides. Arriving a few days early to scout and tune up their shooting with some squirrel hunting, the ladies enter the next chapter of their hunting journey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 2
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode.

programme.title: MeatEater - Steve Makes the Team: Kentucky Small Game
programme.desc: Kevin Murphy and his band of Kentucky small game hunters introduce Steve to the finest Kentucky has to offer. Gray squirrels with tree hounds and cottontails with beagles, in Kentucky, it's the dogs that do the hunting. Cathead biscuits, sawmill gravy, and fried small game round out the Kentucky adventure.

programme.title: MeatEater - A Trip of Firsts: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steve and Janis head into the remote mountains of Sonora, Mexico, to pursue the elusive Coues deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Trapped in History: Wyoming Beaver
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to the historic beaver trapping grounds of Wyoming to explore the legacy of the mountain man era. As he sets traps along the Green River, Steve immerses himself in the methods and stories of early American trappers. Alongside his quest to catch beavers, he delves into the fascinating history of how beavers shaped the fur trade and American frontier life. It's a journey through both the rugged landscapes and the rich heritage of the American West.

programme.title: MeatEater - Conservation History, New Mexico Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and ecologist Karl Malcolm head to the Cibola National Forest, guided by a century-old tip from conservationist Aldo Leopold, to hunt Merriam's wild turkeys. Their adventure showcases the forest's rich history and the legacy of Leopold's conservation efforts while they track these elusive birds through challenging terrain.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Smoked Meats With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Steven Rinella learns new culinary tricks from Chef Eduardo Garcia, a wild game enthusiast from Charged Film & Montana Mex. As Eduardo shares his expertise in smoking meats and preparing wild game dishes, Steve takes notes, eager to expand his culinary repertoire and bring fresh flavors to his own wild game cooking adventures.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lone Star Pork: Texas Hog
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins ranch manager and wildlife biologist Ben Binnion in Texas to explore the often-overlooked aspects of hog management. During the annual pig roundup, Steve learns about the ecological impact and challenges of controlling the hog population, providing a deeper understanding of the complexities of hunting and wildlife management in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Memories: Montana Black Bear
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads deep into Montana's rugged mountains to hunt black bears, reflecting on two decades of memories in this harsh yet captivating landscape. Joined by memories of his brother and their youthful adventures, Steve navigates grizzly country, contemplates the passage of time, and explores the evolving nature of hunting. Through encounters with both bears and the terrain, Steve seeks not just game but a connection to the past and the lessons it holds.

programme.title: MeatEater - Nevada Mule Deer with Joe Rogan
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with Joe Rogan in Nevada's high desert to bowhunt for elusive mule deer bucks. Surrounded by vast public lands and rugged terrain, they navigate the challenges of close-range stalking with their bows. With Joe's enthusiasm for archery and Steve's experience, the duo pushes their limits in pursuit of these wary deer, embracing the highs and lows of hunting in one of America's most unforgiving landscapes.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Moose Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and Janis are deep in the wilderness of eastern Alaska on a challenging moose and caribou hunt. Joined by Janis' father, Papa Jani, who wants one last adventure before age catches up, they endure the highs and lows of remote hunting. With patience wearing thin and the weather turning, the group pushes through thick willows and foggy mornings, hoping for a bit of luck and a successful hunt before their journey's end.

programme.title: Domestic Abuse Allegation
programme.desc: The State claimed that there was a domestic incident between Darrell Brooks and the mother of his child just before he rammed his SUV into that holiday parade. Brooks wasn't done questioning his ex-girlfriend on the stand.

programme.title: Argument Leads To Deadly Rampage
programme.desc: The detective who was assigned to the domestic violence complaint against Darrell Brooks testified in his trial. According to Brooks's ex-girlfriend, Erika Patterson, she was arguing with him all day.

programme.title: Mass Chaos Everywhere
programme.desc: According to police, Darrell Brooks was fleeing from a fight before he drove his SUV into the Christmas parade killing six people and injuring 61. Police said they were on his tail, but it was too late.

programme.title: Eyewitness Remembers Brooks Behind The Wheel
programme.desc: Investigators said that Darrell Brooks tried to run over his ex-girlfriend, which then led to a knife fight. By the time police arrived, they said Brooks left in his red SUV heading toward the parade.

programme.title: Capítulo 72
programme.desc: The girls get back at their dance professor, Lulu. Mia gets Miguel thrown out of the mall. Alma comes up with a plan to sabotage Franco and Valeria's romance.

programme.title: Capítulo 73
programme.desc: Roberta gets mad at Alma because she's friends with Mia. Madariaga warns Galia to keep an eye on Pilar since she's in a relationship with Joaquín.

programme.title: Capítulo 74
programme.desc: Mia cries after she hears what Miguel thinks of her and seeing him kissing Julieta. Roberta is kicked out by Lupita's mom for playing with Lupita's sister, Dulce.

programme.title: Capítulo 75
programme.desc: Pilar tells her mother, Galia, Joaquín doesn't do drugs because he's an athlete. Alma is afraid that Roberta's father will take Roberta away.

programme.title: Capítulo 76
programme.desc: Alma tells Franco that Roberta's father wants to take Roberta away with him to Spain. Marcelino tells Roberta that her mother is afraid of losing her to her father.

programme.title: Capítulo 77
programme.desc: Alma tells Roberta that she can't stop her father from taking her away to Spain and that she loves her very much. Pilar sees Vico and Joaquín kissing.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 79
programme.desc: Mia asks her dad to stop Miguel from getting expelled after she told on him and Julieta. Esteban receives love letters and thinks they are from Mia.

programme.title: Capítulo 80
programme.desc: Lulu apologizes to the students for lying. Celina asks Mia to take her place at the band's rehearsal. Vico demands that Joaquín breaks up with Pilar.

programme.title: Capítulo 81
programme.desc: Giovanni gives his support to Mia. Fearing the Lodge might hurt Julieta, Miguel breaks up with her. By request of Diego, Facundo turns down Roberta.

programme.desc: Es el cumpleaños de Albertano y doña Lucha le organiza una fiesta, María se pinta el cabello y se pone su más lindo vestido para recuperar a Albertano, le dedica canciones compuestas por ella y le recita un poema. Doña Lucha se siente mal.

programme.title: Bibi maneja
programme.desc: Bibi quiere aprender a conducir, lo que a los P. Luche les parece una excelente idea, solo para que Bibi se convierta en su chofer. Sin embargo, cuando llevan esto al extremo, Bibi sufre un pequeño accidente.

programme.title: El funeral del Merengues
programme.desc: En el velorio de Merengueti, un empleado de Industrias Camerino, Ludovico se da cuenta de que el cadáver tiene el reloj que perdió en la mañana e intenta quitárselo.

programme.title: Un Rudo Amanecer
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: No Hace Falta
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: Tacos veganos
programme.desc: Virginia y Borre terminan su relacion y no conforme, ella decide iniciar su propio negocio de tacos veganos. Arturo se encuentra un billete de mil pesos.

programme.title: El punto debil
programme.desc: Salvatierra's meet Rivero. Monica visits Isidro and talks finance with Rutila. Pastrana's Chicago trip doesn't go well and Colon is onto him. Skinny learns the location of 30-30s shipment to Monica. Victor takes Monica by surprise.

programme.title: El imperio de Casillas
programme.desc: Aurelio admits fault to Dalvio. As does Jorge to Esperanza. Zoe isn't fooled by Salazar. Victor foils Monica's drop and sabotages the Pastrana deal. Colon ask Rivero to bug Tata's IP address. Omar joins Jaime and asks him to seduce Paloma.

programme.title: Un remolino de poder
programme.desc: Colon questions Jorge. Monica needs to escape from Victor's imprisonment. Ruti rightly accuses her father. Pastrana targets Casillases and nabs Arelis. Penumbre strong-arms Super Javi unaware of his benefactor. Monica rips Victor's ethics.

programme.title: Plan sangriento
programme.desc: Pastrana arrives in Mexico. Felina and Pilar are busy in Spain. Aurelio is in Colombia to find 30-30. Someones looking for Eunice. Victor interrogates Ramon as does Tony with Arelis. Carmen asks Ismael about a loan for Nazareno.

programme.title: Infeliz encuentro
programme.desc: Castillo informs Teran of Evelyn's escape. Juan Carlos demands Tony. Arabs agree to deal with Pilar. Paloma asks Omar for a divorce. Zoe buys Esperanza a gift. Aurelio is transporting the shipment via Cartel of the Suns.

programme.title: Escandalo a la vista
programme.desc: The family arranges Victor's final resting. Pilar and Felina move on the emerald and cocaine businesses in Spain. Aurelio settles tempers on the left and right in Colombia. Carla is making waves on her radio show.

programme.title: El presidente un sicario
programme.desc: Filemon continues to fail Tony. Juan Carlos seeks out Ruth. Aurelio meets the President in Caracas. Monica relocates to the US and re-affirms her deal with 30-30. Felina showcases the emeralds to Spain. Ismael finds the Maras holed up.

programme.title: Caller a un testigo
programme.desc: Venezuelan President asks Aurelio for a favor. The Defense is preparing a raid. Paloma returns to Los Pinos. Tony wants to avenge Ruben. Grenas mentions the sighting of Esperanza. Aurelio wants Skinny in Honduras. The shipment gets stopped.

programme.title: Mas de una baja
programme.desc: Penumbra gets the shipment released. Omar blackmails Jaime. Pilar gets ahead of herself and Feline doesn't trust the distributor. Aurelio kills Jobless and escapes DEA. Colon sees Tata from drone photos and pinpoints the ranch.

programme.title: Rodean a los Casillas
programme.desc: Monica quarrels with BabyGirl but pays respect to see Isidro. Carmen's smitten for Ismael. Wig tracks Esperanza to Boulder. Buzzy gets free. The Army raids the ranch. Aurelio has a jet, a helicopter and a secret tunnel.

programme.title: Drones, balas y allanamiento
programme.desc: Aurelio bazookas the cocaine to avoid charges on the innocents. The wanted take refuge in the tunnel. Castillo arrests Dalvio and Tata. Pilar recognizes Raymundo as does Ruti with Colon. Dona Alba says she's through with all the killings.

programme.title: Tapa calefactora
programme.desc: Germán intentará instalar una nueva tapa calefactora en el inodoro de don Hipólito. Mientras que, Vanessa probará un remedio contra las canas.

programme.title: Regalo perfecto
programme.desc: Luisito le da un regalo a Silvita por su cumpleanos, pero ella no lo esperaba. En tanto que, Calaco decide visitar a Rocco en su casa.

programme.title: Tendedero
programme.desc: Magdalena decides to put a clothesline in the middle of the corridors of the building and Luis will look for a way to remove it.

programme.title: Amigos
programme.desc: Silvia agrega a Luis al chat de la guardería y Germán recibe la visita de sus amigos comentaristas de TUDN que transmiten un partido desde la conserjería.

programme.title: Auto nuevo
programme.desc: Luis le compra un auto nuevo a Silvia para que pasee con Luisito Jr. y Morris le tiene una mala noticia a sus padres: no le gusta el rock.

programme.title: Tacos veganos
programme.desc: Virginia y Borre terminan su relacion y no conforme, ella decide iniciar su propio negocio de tacos veganos. Arturo se encuentra un billete de mil pesos.

programme.title: Ropa de paca
programme.desc: Jorjáis decide invertir en un negocio de ropa de paca y descubre que no está solo, tiene competencia. Silvia y Luis buscan sobrevivir al primer día de guardería de Luisito Jr.

programme.title: Silvia party loving
programme.desc: Karla, la sobrina de Silvia, la visita en su casa, y ella finge que tiene una actitud muy cool y se va de parranda con ella. Pedro se siente mal y no puede salir de su cuarto.

programme.title: Nano por un día
programme.desc: La guardería está cerrada y Silvia y Luis no tienen quién cuide a Luisito Jr., por lo que tendrán que elegir entre los vecinos. Hipólito, Pedro y Germán buscan hacer válida la garantía de un celular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: El grupo de whats
programme.desc: Germán convoca a una junta vecinal, pero nadie asiste porque nadie vio el anuncio en el pizarrón, Jorjais les propone hacer un grupo de chat para enterarse de los acontecimientos en el edificio.

programme.title: El gas
programme.desc: Como es costumbre en el edificio, los vecinos no pagan la cuota del gas, y ante la negativa de todos, Luis decide poner su propio tanque estacionario ¡en la azotea!

programme.title: Franeleros
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Los vecinos hacen una junta para planear quitarlos sin que haya consecuencias.

programme.title: El reciclaje
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura. Algo muy básico: orgánica e inorgánica, Germán es el encargado de dicha misión.

programme.title: La fiesta de Morris
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: La chica del feis
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima; Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Como en casa
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación; un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Look Forward Not Far
programme.desc: We all go through times when we're looking ahead, and our future looks uncertain. We want clarity, but instead, God gives us the courage to move forward in faith. It's in these moments we learn not to be driven by what's easy.

programme.title: When God Says Let Go
programme.desc: Is your faith being tested? If you've been waiting on the details of what God has next, remember that God doesn't give a test without a lesson first, so if He's calling you to let go of something, you can trust He's already provided you with what.

programme.title: All You've Got To Do Is Don't
programme.desc: We all find ourselves in seasons when we feel like we don't have what it takes, and we don't know what to do. But don't be afraid or discouraged, because God isn't late - He's working according to His timing. Don't lose hope, and don't give up.

programme.title: God's Got The Hard Part!
programme.desc: Just like a seed, you're not buried, you're planted. When you feel like you're facing trials in the dark, remember God's developing you to help you fulfill your purpose.

programme.title: Don't Let The Funeral Fool You
programme.desc: Don't let the disappointment of this season cause you to quit growing and relying on God. Have a funeral for your expectations, leave it with God, and let Him open your eyes to what's next.

programme.title: Faithful With A Few
programme.desc: In Faithful With A Few, we're reminded that our praise paves the way for God's provision.

programme.title: A Steady Hand For A Sudden Blessing
programme.desc: In A Steady Hand For A Sudden Blessing, Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us that even when we don't see God moving, His hand still holds us steadily.
